Clean datasets, define business metrics, and turn raw records into decisions teams can trust.

docs.title: AboutMian Arham Haroon
docs.text:
About me

I am a Computer Science student focused on SQL, analytics, and practical database-driven systems. I build workflows that turn operational data into clear reports, dashboards, and useful business insights.

Analytics Focus

Data cleaning, exploratory analysis, SQL reporting, dashboards, and business intelligence workflows.

Database Systems

SQLite, PostgreSQL, Supabase, database design, query optimization, and reporting backends.

Practical Builds

Inventory systems, DUKAN reporting modules, data analysis projects, and workflow automation.

Education

Academic path 2026 - Present BS Computer Science (Bridging)

Government College University Faisalabad. CGPA: 3.54 / 4.00.

2022 - 2024 Associate Degree in Computer Science

Riphah International University, Faisalabad.

2019 - 2021 Intermediate in Computer Science (ICS)

Shiblee College of Commerce, Faisalabad.

2017 - 2019 Matriculation in Computer Science

Govt. Islamia High School Gutti, Faisalabad.

Credentials

Certifications and languages Certifications Introduction to SQL - Simplilearn SkillUp SQL and Relational Databases 101 - IBM Cognitive Class Python for Data Science - IBM Cognitive Class Languages English - Professional working proficiency Urdu - Native proficiency Punjabi - Conversational proficiency

docs.title: ResumeMian Arham Haroon
docs.text:
Profile

Data Analyst | Analytics Engineer | SQL Developer

Python SQL Excel PostgreSQL SQLite

Building data-driven applications, reporting systems, and analytics solutions using SQL, Python, and modern database technologies. Focused on transforming raw operational data into reporting dashboards and measurable business insights.

Download CV Contact Phone+92 322 7724235 Emailarhamharoon000@gmail.com LinkedInmian-arham-haroon GitHubmian-arham-haroon Open ToInternship | Junior Data Analyst | SQL Developer | Analytics Roles

Professional focus

Seeking opportunities in Data Analytics, SQL Development, and Business Intelligence where I can build reporting systems, analyze business data, and contribute to data-driven decision making.

Technical skills

Focused toolkit Data AnalyticsPython, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, EDA, data cleaning, data transformation Database & QueryingSQL, SQLite, PostgreSQL, Supabase, database design, query optimization Business IntelligenceExcel, KPI reporting, dashboard development, business reporting, data visualization Development ToolsGit, GitHub, VS Code, Jupyter Notebook, Postman ProgrammingPython, SQL, C++

Projects

Selected work DUKAN App Reporting & Analytics Module SQLiteSQLReact Native
  • Designed sales, inventory, customer credit, and invoice reporting modules.
  • Built SQL-driven KPI dashboards for operational monitoring and decision support.
Business Data Analysis Project PythonPandasSQL
  • Cleaned and transformed datasets for analysis, reporting, and trend discovery.
  • Used SQL aggregation and Matplotlib visuals to communicate business findings.
Inventory Management System PythonSQLiteTkinter
  • Developed a desktop inventory application with SQLite-backed CRUD workflows.
  • Built stock monitoring, search, and inventory reporting features with Tkinter.

Education

docs.title: SkillsSkills for data-driven solutions, reporting systems, and analytics workflows.
docs.text:
Technical toolkit

Building data-driven solutions, business reporting systems, and analytics workflows focused on solving operational and business problems.

Data Analytics

Analyze structured and raw datasets to identify trends, generate insights, and support business decision-making.

Python Pandas NumPy EDA Data cleaning Data transformation Statistical analysis SQL & Database Engineering

Design relational databases, write optimized SQL queries, perform joins and aggregations, and build efficient backend reporting workflows.

SQL SQLite PostgreSQL Supabase Database design Query optimization Data modeling Business Reporting & Intelligence

Develop reporting systems that monitor business operations and provide measurable insights for performance tracking.

Sales reporting Inventory reporting Customer analytics Invoice reporting KPI tracking Dashboard development Business intelligence Application Development

Build database-connected applications with structured backend workflows and complete data management systems.

CRUD development Python Tkinter Postman Backend logic Search systems Workflow automation Data Processing & Automation

Prepare, clean, transform, and automate datasets for analytics workflows and business reporting systems.

Data processing Data cleaning Data transformation Automation Workflow optimization Reporting pipelines Developer Workflow

Maintain organized development workflows using modern development and version control tools.

Git GitHub VS Code Jupyter Notebook Postman DUKAN App Analytics Module Built sales, inventory, customer credit, invoice, and dashboard reporting with SQLite and SQL. Business Data Analysis Cleaned datasets, performed EDA, applied SQL aggregation, and created Matplotlib reports. Inventory Management System Developed CRUD, search, stock monitoring, and inventory reports using Python, SQLite, and Tkinter.

Certifications

Verified learning proof

Certificates supporting the Python and SQL foundation used across analytics and reporting projects.

IBM Cognitive Class Python for Data Science View Certificate IBM Cognitive Class SQL and Relational Databases 101 View Certificate Simplilearn SkillUp Introduction to SQL View Certificate Education BS Computer Science, Government College University Faisalabad. CGPA 3.54 / 4.00. Best fit Data analyst, analytics engineer, SQL developer, and reporting-focused roles. Strength Turning operational data into reports, dashboards, and measurable business insights.

docs.title: 🗣️ Testimonials
docs.text: 🌟 Discover what mentors, peers, and collaborators have to say about my passion for data science, teamwork, and dedication to continuous learning.

docs.title: 👨‍🏫 Academic Mentor – Riphah International University
docs.text: "Arham is one of the most enthusiastic students I've worked with. His ability to grasp technical concepts quickly and apply them in real-world projects like the Retail Management System is impressive. A bright future awaits him in data science!" — Dr. Imran Khalid, Computer Science Lecturer

docs.title: 👨‍💻 Project Collaborator – Retail Management System
docs.text: "Arham brings energy and precision to every project. During our collaboration, his knowledge of Python and database integration helped us build a reliable system. He's a great problem-solver and always eager to learn more." — Arham Haroon, Developer

docs.title: 🧠 Peer – Data Science Study Circle
docs.text: "Arham is a fast learner and a great team player. He often leads our study discussions, simplifies complex topics, and motivates others to explore more. His expertise in tools like Pandas and Matplotlib really shines." — Irfan Malik, Study Group Member

docs.title: 🏢 Former Supervisor – Baba Tikka Kohinoor
docs.text: "Arham was punctual, professional, and a quick learner. Though his role wasn’t technical, his attention to detail and communication skills made him a valuable part of our team. I’m confident he'll excel in any field he chooses." — Saeed Ahmed, Restaurant Manager

docs.title: 🤝 Let’s Connect!
docs.text: If we've worked together, learned together, or crossed paths during a project or class, I'd love to hear from you! Your words could inspire the next step in my journey. 😊 📩 Get in touch here
